name: prompt closed-loop step promote-to-rationale verifies the model rationale detector passes for the promoted version
command:
mkdir -p prompts/x && printf 'name: x
model: sonnet
model_rationale: cost-quality balance for review workload
' > prompts/x/v1.1.0.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/closed-loop-test.sh" --step promote-to-rationale --prompt prompts/x/v1.1.0.md 2>out.txt && grep -q 'rationale_detector=pass' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
